text: Moving from the busy outer hallway to this space of ideas, I sense an odd shift from the confusion of collective movement to the focused charge of innovation. Here among words about growth, research, and collaboration, I feel quietly hopeful, as if standing within the blueprint for a kinder, smarter future. I am curious and attentive, aware of both the ambitions on display and the necessary imperfections of progress. The energy is vibrant—possibility pulses just beneath the surface.
